Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'  {p[\\"name\\"]} \({p[\\"dob\\"]}\) -> Chart {p[\\"chart_number\\"]} \(score {p[\\"match_score\\"]}\)'\) for p in d['patients']]")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Name: {d.get\(\\"name\\", \\"?\\"\)}' \) print\(f'Rows: {d.get\(\\"totalRowCount\\", \\"?\\"\)}'\) cols = d.get\('columns', []\) print\(f'Columns \({len\(cols\)}\): {[c[\\"title\\"] for c in cols[:12]]}'\) " echo done)

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f'Name: {d.get\(\\"name\\"\)}'\) print\(f'Total rows: {d.get\(\\"totalRowCount\\"\)}'\) print\(\) cols = d.get\('columns', []\) print\(f'Columns \({len\(cols\)}\):'\) for c in cols: print\(f' [{c[\\"id\\"]}] {c[\\"title\\"]} \({c.get\(\\"type\\",\\"?\\"\)}\)'\) print\(\) print\('Sample rows:'\) rows = d.get\('rows', []\) for row in rows[:3]: print\(f' Row {row[\\"rowNumber\\"]}:'\) for cell in row.get\('cells', []\): col = next\(\(c for c in cols if c['id'] == cell['columnId']\), {}\) val = cell.get\('displayValue'\) or cell.get\('value'\) if val: print\(f' {col.get\(\\"title\\",\\"?\\"\)}: {val}'\) print\(\) ")
